title: Traefik HTTP Middleware
description: An HTTP middleware as exposed by the Traefik /api/http/middlewares endpoint. Each entry shows the middleware's normalized name (name@provider), the middleware type, current status, originating provider, and the routers currently chaining it.

name.description: Normalized middleware identifier in the form name@provider.

provider.description: Configuration provider that created the middleware (docker, kubernetescrd, kubernetesingress, file, consul, nomad, ecs, etc.).

usedBy.description: List of router names that currently chain this middleware.
